title: TiDB Cloud Cluster
description: Schema representing a TiDB Cloud cluster resource, including Dedicated and Serverless variants. Captures the configuration, component specifications, connection details, and operational state of a cluster as managed through the TiDB Cloud API.

clusterId.description: The unique identifier assigned to the cluster by TiDB Cloud.

displayName.description: The human-readable display name of the cluster.

cloudProvider.description: The cloud provider hosting the cluster.

regionId.description: The cloud region identifier where the cluster is deployed (e.g., us-east-1 for AWS).

projectId.description: The TiDB Cloud project ID this cluster belongs to.

tidbVersion.description: The TiDB database version string running on the cluster (e.g., v7.5.0).

state.description: The current operational state of the cluster.

createTime.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the cluster was created.

updateTime.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the cluster was last modified.

components.description: The component node specifications for TiDB, TiKV, and optionally TiFlash.

connectionStrings.description: The available connection string options for this cluster.

port.description: The SQL connection port number for the cluster.

labels.description: Optional key-value labels attached to the cluster for organizational purposes.

ClusterComponents.description: The component configuration for a TiDB Cloud Dedicated cluster.

tiflash.description: The optional TiFlash columnar storage node configuration for analytical queries.

ComputeComponentSpec.description: Specification for a stateless TiDB compute node group.

nodeSize.description: The node size key identifying the CPU and memory configuration (e.g., 8C16G).

nodeQuantity.description: The number of TiDB compute nodes in this group.

vcpu.description: The number of virtual CPU cores per node.

memoryGiB.description: The amount of memory in GiB per node.

StorageComponentSpec.description: Specification for a TiKV or TiFlash storage node group with persistent storage.

nodeSize.description: The node size key identifying the CPU and memory configuration.

nodeQuantity.description: The number of storage nodes in this group.

storageSize.description: The storage capacity per node in GiB.

storageType.description: The storage class type (e.g., Premium, Basic).

ConnectionStrings.description: The set of available connection string configurations for a cluster.

defaultUser.description: The default database username for this cluster.

vpcPeering.description: The VPC peering connection string for private network access.

ConnectionString.description: A connection string specifying the host and port for a cluster.

host.description: The hostname or IP address for the connection.

port.description: The TCP port number for the connection.

ImportTask.description: A data import task that loads external data files into a TiDB Cloud cluster.

importId.description: The unique identifier of the import task.

clusterId.description: The ID of the cluster receiving the imported data.

sourceType.description: The source type of the import data.

fileFormat.description: The file format of the import data.

state.description: The current state of the import task.

progress.description: The completion percentage of the import task.

targetDatabase.description: The target database in the cluster to import data into.

createTime.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the import task was created.

errorMessage.description: An error message if the import task failed.

S3Source.description: Configuration for importing data from an AWS S3 bucket.

bucketUri.description: The S3 bucket URI path containing import files (e.g., s3://my-bucket/data/).

roleArn.description: The AWS IAM Role ARN granting TiDB Cloud read access to the S3 bucket.

ApiKey.description: A TiDB Cloud API key used for authenticating API requests via HTTP Digest Authentication.

name.description: The resource name of the API key.

accessKey.description: The public access key used as the username in Digest Authentication.

secretKey.description: The private secret key used as the password. Only returned at creation time and must be stored securely.

displayName.description: The human-readable display name for this API key.

role.description: The permission role assigned to this API key (e.g., Organization Owner, Project Viewer).

projectId.description: The project ID this key is scoped to. Zero or absent indicates an organization-level key.

AuditLog.description: A console audit log entry recording an administrative action performed in the TiDB Cloud console.

eventType.description: The type of administrative event that was logged.

operationEmail.description: The email address of the user who performed the action.

timestamp.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp when the event occurred.

clusterId.description: The cluster ID involved in the event, if applicable.

projectId.description: The project ID involved in the event, if applicable.

orgId.description: The organization ID where the event occurred.
